_README: Per-project progress state. Fetch this FIRST before any work on the project; the assistant outputs an updated copy at every step boundary and the USER pushes it. Never trust the chat scroll — trust this file plus the DB.

parked_ideas.idea: Short video (Instagram Reels) for richer 'what it's like there' proof
parked_ideas.decision: DEFERRED until all sites built + live. Do NOT embed live IG Reels in article bodies (kills Core Web Vitals / SEO, GDPR cookies, content rot). Preferred path when revisited: self-host short clips on Cloudinary (owned, fast, no cookies) — check Cloudinary video quota/pricing first; OR click-to-load facade for one curated Reel per pillar; OR own-brand Reels linked from footer/author bio only.
parked_ideas.revisit_when: post-launch, using real traffic data to target which pages get video
